channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Amtrak Considers Relaxing Gun Rules, Reports Indicate
item.description: Sources report Amtrak is considering changes to its gun policy. Concerns have been raised regarding potential security impacts.

item.title: David Muir Reports on Miracle Heart Transplants
item.description: Three boys awaiting heart transplants formed a friendship at Texas Children's Hospital, then received matching hearts.

item.title: Empire State Building Celebrates 95th Anniversary
item.description: Good Morning America highlights the Empire State Building's 95th anniversary, a landmark synonymous with New York City.

item.title: Kentucky bank robbery leaves 2 dead, suspect in custody
item.description: Two employees were fatally shot during a bank robbery in Kentucky on Thursday. Police have apprehended a person of interest.
